accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurately describe its findings and operative provisions.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims; the summary faithfully tracks the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose to reaffirm the Declaration as an Organic Law.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The bill amends no existing statute; the summary correctly notes this.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no exceptions or conditions; the summary correctly notes their absence.

effective_dates.why: The bill specifies no effective dates; the summary correctly notes this.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers findings, the reaffirmation provision, and the republication of the Declaration text.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive without editorializing.

concise.why: Free of padding and appropriately concise.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Declaration, Constitution, and Northwest Ordinance as in the bill.

correct_figures.why: The date July 4, 1776 and 250th anniversary are stated correctly.
